nasb.text: The way in front of them was like the appearance of the chambers which were on the north, according to their length so was their width, and all their exits were both according to their arrangements and openings.

esv.text: with a passage in front of them. They were similar to the chambers on the north, of the same length and breadth, with the same exits and arrangements and doors,

cnv.text: 這些房子前面有一條夾道，跟北面的一樣，長寬相同。出口之處，也與北面的一樣。

ccb.text: 厢房前面有通道。这些厢房与北面的厢房一样，长宽相同，出入口和结构也一样。
